name: Code A Ancient Ruins
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>古</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>代</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>跡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>コード<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Each time a face-up "Alien" monster(s) is destroyed, place 1 A-Counter on this card. Once per turn, you can remove 2 A-Counters from anywhere on the field to Special Summon 1 "Alien" monster from your Graveyard.
eff: Each time a face-up "Alien" monster(s) is destroyed, place 1 A-Counter on this card. Once per turn, you can remove 2 A-Counters from anywhere on the field to Special Summon 1 "Alien" monster from your Graveyard.
